name: Supreme Court Update
subject: the Supreme Court blockade
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8356645836930678784/-4464450416351903744?code=mcginty)
---
Friend,

It's been three months since President Obama nominated Judge Merrick Garland to the Supreme Court.

**Which means for three months Pat Toomey has shown no sign that he 'll do his job and give Judge Garland a fair hearing.**

We're not even talking about a yes vote to confirm Judge Garland. **Republicans won 't even hold a _simple hearing_.** This is an unprecedented level of obstruction.

Toomey has gone so far as to brag that President Obama's nominee **" will be rejected by the Senate"** and he told the _Associated Press_ that he doesn't want to **" mislead people into thinking senators are strictly weighing a nominee's qualifications."**

[**Friend, three months of the Republican Supreme Court blockade is more than enough. Will you join in calling on Senator Toomey and his allies to do their jobs?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8356645836930678784/-4464450416351903744?code=mcginty)

There's a clear pattern emerging among GOP senators.

* Hold hearings on the Supreme Court nominee? **Won 't do their jobs.**
* Protect Americans from gun violence? **Won 't do their jobs.**
* Raise the minimum wage, make college affordable or pass paid leave? **Won 't do their jobs.**

Here's what we think: **If they won 't do their jobs, then we'll have to vote them out.**

[**Add your name: Call on Republicans to stop their Supreme Court obstruction.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8356645836930678784/-4464450416351903744?code=mcginty)

Thank you,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8356645836930678784/-4320335228276047872?refcode=e20160618&refcode2=e20160618&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/8356645836930678784/-4536508010389831680).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Ashley Kroetsch, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Your call this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/servlet/MailView?ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0).

We're not wasting any time. | Team Hillary --

Voting in this primary is officially over -- we won! -- and now it's time to take this campaign to the next level and get ready to beat Donald Trump and other Republicans this November.

We need to get as many folks as possible to join our team as we head into the general, and you're a big part of that. Your conversations are proven to be the most effective way to get other supporters involved.

**[Can we count on you to make ten calls to other Hillary voters? Get started now!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Trump isn't wasting anytime going after our team. One of his Super PACs has already announced a million-dollar ad buy against us. He's going to keep throwing his baseless attacks at Hillary and other Democrats, but we're going to win this election by having real conversations with voters and engaging folks on the issues that matter.

If you make just ten calls this weekend, that will be a huge help for the campaign. Can we count on you?

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/calls**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks for all that you do,

Ashley

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU3NzQzMDQS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&b=0&j=ODIyNzk3MzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Michael Tyler, RussFeingold.com
subject: Senator Johnson's Donald Duck
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Sitting Republican senators can't have it both ways. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a1d/1307808116/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160617-denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&utm_campaign=denounce-trump&utm_medium=ema") Friend, A sitting senator wants it both ways. Senator Ron Johnson wants to distance himself from Donald Trump's comments -- yet he won't renounce his support for the presumptive GOP nominee. Just this week, Senator Johnson tried to distance himself from Donald Trump's racist comments about a federal judge. Then Senator Johnson signaled that he didn't support Donald Trump's horrendous proposal to ban all Muslims from entering the country. Yet, in his own words, Senator Johnson has said "on the big issues I'm in total agreement with Mr. Trump" and "I fully intend to support our nominee." It's time for this ugly, spineless routine to stop, and for Senator Johnson -- and Republicans across the country -- to denounce Donald Trump. Anything less is unacceptable and dangerous. **[Do you agree? Please, add your name to our petition urging Senator Johnson to renounce his support for Donald Trump.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a1d/1307808116/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160617-denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&utm_campaign=denounce-trump&utm_medium=ema")** Sitting Republican senators can't have it both ways. They can't disagree with Donald Trump's most offensive, hateful comments while still fully supporting his candidacy -- a candidacy that stokes more racism, violence, and hatred with each day. Let's send Senator Johnson a message. Wisconsinites and Americans across the country aren't buying his song and dance. **[Add your name today to urge Senator Johnson to stop supporting Donald Trump.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a1d/1307808116/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160617-denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&utm_campaign=denounce-trump&utm_medium=ema")** Thanks for lending your voice to this. Michael Tyler
Communications Director | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a1d/1307808116/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160617-denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&source=ema_2016-06-17_denounce-trump_oos&utm_campaign=denounce-trump&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a1a/1307808116/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a1b/1307808116/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a18/1307808116/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4335/1c469400/6f2c53e/3568a19/1307808116/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Just this week, Senator Johnson tried to distance himself from Donald Trump's racist comments about a federal judge. Then Senator Johnson signaled that he didn't support Donald Trump's horrendous proposal to ban all Muslims from entering the country. Yet, in his own words, Senator Johnson has said "on the big issues I'm in total agreement with Mr. Trump" and "I fully intend to support our nominee." It's time for this ugly, spineless routine to stop, and for Senator Johnson -- and Republicans across the country -- to denounce Donald Trump. Anything less is unacceptable and dangerous. name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Re: real change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, did you see Katherine's email?

Help us stop Citizens United and their special interest friends and stand up for our progressive values. **[Chip in $25 or whatever you can right now.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/3972477/1363181641/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em061816&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+25+or+whatever+you+can+right+now&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")**

Begin Forwarded Message:

Friend,

This past week Chris's Republican opponent urged her supporters on with these words -- "We must get REAL CHANGE in Washington. The only way to truly keep Americans safe, both at home and abroad, is to get America back in the leadership business."

Frankly we couldn't agree more. Real change IS what we need. And that change begins by removing Mitch McConnell as Majority leader of the U.S. Senate so that we can address the serious challenges our country faces today. The 'leadership business' is about getting results for the American people -- not talking tough while advancing the agendas of groups like Citizens United, the NRA, big oil and those trying to defund Planned Parenthood!

[**That 's where you come in friend. Please click here to donate $25 or whatever you can right now to fund our Maryland Rapid Response Fund and STOP Citizens United and their special interest friends!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/3972474/1363181641/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em061816&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+where+you+come+in+FIRSTNAMEfr&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/3972475/1363181641/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em061816&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+5+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")** **[Donate $15 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/3972472/1363181641/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em061816&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+15+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")** **[Donate $35 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/3972473/1363181641/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em061816&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+35+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")** **[Donate $75 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/3972470/1363181641/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em061816&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Donate+75+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")** **[Donate $125 to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/3972471/1363181641/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?express_lane=true&amount=125&refcode=em061816&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Donate+125+to+stand+with+Chris+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")** **[Or, donate another amount to stand with Chris>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/397240e/1363181641/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em061816&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount+to+stand+with+C&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")** Simple words can too easily be mangled to mean different things. But you and I know that REAL CHANGE does not mean electing a Republican to the Senate here in Maryland! That's why your engagement in this general election campaign is so important.

We cannot afford to take anything for granted in November. Marylanders learned that lesson the hard way two years ago when we elected a Republican Governor after everyone said it would never happen. There is nothing groups like Citizens United and the Koch Brothers would like more than to defeat one of the key champions of campaign finance reform -- that's why they have decided to target Chris.

**[We need your help to do what it takes to win. Please, click here to donate $25 or whatever you can to help Chris fight for REAL CHANGE and send Mitch McConnell packing. With your help we'll show Washington Republicans that we're prepared to fight for our progressive values. >>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd6/70cdc2ba/47f5e46b/397240f/1363181641/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em061816&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+We+need+your+help+to+do+what+it+takes+to&utm_campaign=em061816_1&source=em061816_1")**

Your involvement is what has made the difference throughout this grassroots campaign.

Thanks so much for being part of this!

Katherine
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

clean_body: | Friend, did you see Katherine's email? Help us stop Citizens United and their special interest friends and stand up for our progressive values. "" Begin Forwarded Message: Friend, This past week Chris's Republican opponent urged her supporters on with these words -- "We must get REAL CHANGE in Washington. The only way to truly keep Americans safe, both at home and abroad, is to get America back in the leadership business." Frankly we couldn't agree more. Real change IS what we need. And that change begins by removing Mitch McConnell as Majority leader of the U.S. Senate so that we can address the serious challenges our country faces today. The 'leadership business' is about getting results for the American people -- not talking tough while advancing the agendas of groups like Citizens United, the NRA, big oil and those trying to defund Planned Parenthood! "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Simple words can too easily be mangled to mean different things. But you and I know that REAL CHANGE does not mean electing a Republican to the Senate here in Maryland! That's why your engagement in this general election campaign is so important. We cannot afford to take anything for granted in November. Marylanders learned that lesson the hard way two years ago when we elected a Republican Governor after everyone said it would never happen. There is nothing groups like Citizens United and the Koch Brothers would like more than to defeat one of the key champions of campaign finance reform -- that's why they have decided to target Chris. "" Your involvement is what has made the difference throughout this grassroots campaign. Thanks so much for being part of this! Katherine Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: This is what I saw after Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
The good, the bad, and the ugly | Friend --

Since the horrible shooting in Orlando last weekend, we’ve seen some of the best of what it means to be American.

We saw people in Orlando lined up for blocks to donate blood. People coming together for vigils, marches, and demonstrations to say that in this country, we all have a right to be safe.

We saw Senator Chris Murphy -- and 38 others -- hold the floor for 15 hours to demand a fair vote on gun violence prevention, and we saw tens of thousands of Americans get involved in that filibuster by making phone calls and getting on social media to make their voices heard.

We saw the best of America this week. But in Donald Trump’s responses, we saw the opposite.

We can’t have a president who responds to an act of terror by patting himself on the back, spewing wild conspiracy theories, and playing into the hands of terrorists with his uncensored Islamophobia.

**Americans proved this week that we are better than who Donald Trump makes us out to be. So now here’s the question: Are we ready to do what it takes to stop him from becoming president? Just $1 can make a difference -- don’t wait to chip in:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

John

John Podesta
Campaign Chair
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU3NzQ3NjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIyODEwMDE1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: what we're up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| I apologize for emailing on a Saturday, friend, but I want you to know what we are up against. Earlier this month the president of Citizens United headlined a SuperPAC fundraiser for my opponent and next week Senator Orrin Hatch, who led the charge in the U.S. Senate to defund Planned Parenthood, is throwing a fundraiser to help fill my opponent's campaign war chest.

It's clear that a candidate like my opponent who has been a member of the Maryland Right to Life committee and opposed campaign finance reforms would be a natural choice for Citizens United and for Orrin Hatch, but her views are not natural for a state like Maryland. And it's our job to make sure that Maryland voters are aware of her positions.

That's where you come in, friend. **[I need your help to fully fund our Maryland Rapid Response Fund and make sure Maryland voters understand the stakes in this election. Can you make a contribution of any amount right now?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd4/70cdc2ba/47f4792a/397242e/4152154450/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em061816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+help+to+fully+fund+our+Maryl&utm_campaign=em061816_2&source=em061816_2")**

**[Please use this personalized link to give.>>> ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd4/70cdc2ba/47f4792a/397242f/4152154450/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-koch-attack-june16?refcode=em061816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+use+this+personalized+link+to+giv&utm_campaign=em061816_2&source=em061816_2")**

Thank you so much for your continued support. We couldn't do it without you.

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd4/70cdc2ba/47f4792a/397242c/4152154450/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em061816_2&source=em061816_2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
